examples: But the metallurgist USES the word in relation to a wide variety of processes.
The metallurgist has made iron into dozens of different metals or alloy steels, as we call them.
Daniel Branagan , metallurgist, has an invention that may contribute to the solution to this nagging military problem--and potentially to many civilian problems as well.
In 1972, Neil Cooke began work at Lackenby as a metallurgist.
